generated_oml:
instance PhysicalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor monitoring system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalSensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data collected from physical sensors monitoring the Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model representing physical dimensions using CAD data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler
]

instance DifferentialEquationsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations to simulate dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler
]

instance CyberPhysicalKnowledgeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Knowledge model integrating cyber-physical system interactions and rules"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides simulation to predict Physical Twin behavior under current conditions"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors Physical Twin in real-time for safety and operational optimality"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, OperationalOptimizationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes system performance using optimization algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalOptimizationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in the Physical Twin using fault detection algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultConditionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates system health state through state estimation techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes supervisory control actions to adjust Physical Twin operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustPhysicalTwinAction
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm that processes sensor data and model outputs to detect faults"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm that estimates system health state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithm that processes data and models to improve system performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller that executes supervisory actions based on system state"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm that calibrates models using sensor data to update parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight regarding system safety status"
]

instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for improving operational efficiency"
]

instance FaultConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating fault conditions in the system"
]

instance AdjustPhysicalTwinAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust Physical Twin operations based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical component of a Cyber-Physical System being monitored and controlled by the Digital Twin"
]

instance CyberPhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing the Physical Twin and its computational elements"
    base:contains PhysicalTwin
]
